'''Bovo Yagen''' was the primary of the [[Bovo Yagen system/Legends|Bovo Yagen system]]. It was nearly destroyed by [[Centerpoint Station]]. Its destruction was prevented by young [[Anakin Solo]] who was able to use the a [[planetary repulsor]] to counter the attack in [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1stm}} {{Imo}}
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1st}} {{Hologram}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}}
